entryType: defined entry foyer connecting to open living area
kitchenLocation: northwest corner, open to dining and living areas with pantry adjacent
bedroomLayout: split bedroom layout with bedrooms on opposite ends of unit
bathroomPlacement: two full bathrooms - one ensuite with right bedroom, one shared hall bath accessible from living area
efficiencyNotes: galley kitchen maximizes counter and storage space
central laundry location serves both bedrooms
compact entry transitions efficiently to main living space
uniqueFeatures: built-in dishwasher and appliances in kitchen
angled entry wall creates interesting geometry
both bedrooms have equal size and amenities
dimensionNotes: overall dimensions 30'-11" x 25'-10", bedrooms are identically sized at 9'-6" wide, central circulation area is 5'-0" wide, compact but well-proportioned rooms throughout
